stat.title: Reached on Error Merchants
stat.subtitle: Plate appearances where the batter reached on a fielding error.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry reached on error · Bot 3
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Bryce Harper, assist to second baseman Bryson Stott.

notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Kazuma Okamoto.
